trending_videos.title: Vought Rising - First Look | Prime Video
trending_videos.description:
One nation, under gods. Go back to where supes began in your first look at Vought Rising, coming 2027 to Prime. 

» SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/PrimeVideoSubscribe
 
About Prime Video:
Want to watch it now? We’ve got it. This week’s newest movies, last night’s TV shows, classic favorites, and more are available to stream instantly, plus all your videos are stored in Your Video Library. Prime Video offers a variety of unique and captivating entertainment, including original series “The Boys,” “Invincible,” “Hazbin Hotel,” “The Summer I Turned Pretty,” and more.

trending_videos.title: Vegas Golden Knights at Colorado Avalanche
trending_videos.description: The Colorado Avalanche face the Vegas Golden Knights in Game 2 of the Western Conference Final. Vegas leads the series 1-0 following a 4-2 victory in the opener. Goaltender Adin Hill prepares to anchor the crease for the Golden Knights.

trending_videos.title: Golden State Valkyries at Indiana Fever
trending_videos.description: The Golden State Valkyries travel to Gainbridge Fieldhouse to face the Indiana Fever. Golden State seeks to rebound after losing to Chicago, while Indiana beat Seattle 89-78 behind 21 points from Caitlin Clark in an early-season matchup.

trending_videos.title: The CJ Cup Byron Nelson, Second Round
trending_videos.description: The second round of the PGA Tour Byron Nelson tournament continues at TPC Craig Ranch. The player field battles the standard 36-hole cut line as only the top 65 golfers and ties advance to the competitive weekend in McKinney, Texas.

trending_videos.title: Gutfeld!
trending_videos.description: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

trending_videos.title: Top Gun: Maverick
trending_videos.description: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

trending_videos.title: WWE Friday Night SmackDown
trending_videos.description: Tiffany Stratton hosts an Open Challenge for her US title, and Shinsuke Nakamura vs. Talla Tonga!
